features.quienes_desc: Meet our team and institutional vision
features.holding_desc: Our corporate structure and business units

quienes.subtitulo_pagina: Three generations committed to the field
quienes.slogan: We Are and Will Always Be
quienes.proc_titulo: From field to packaging, with full control
quienes.proc_siembra_desc: Agronomic control from the seed. Lot traceability, densities and sowing dates on our own ranches.
quienes.proc_cosecha_desc: Harvested at optimal maturity. Size supervision and field rejection under PRIMUS GFS standards.
quienes.proc_enfrio_desc: Three pre-cooling plants in Zacatecas. Reduces product temperature in less than two hours.
quienes.proc_empaque_desc: Certified export packing line. PLU labeling, barcodes and sanitary documentation.
quienes.eco_titulo: A complete system, from the root to the client
quienes.eco_pilar1_desc: We operate our own ranches in Loreto, Zacatecas. We control production from the seed, with complete lot traceability to the point of sale.
quienes.eco_pilar2_desc: Own fleet, uninterrupted cold chain and distribution center in San Nicolás de los Garza, NL. We cover markets in Mexico, the U.S. and emerging markets.
quienes.eco_pilar3_desc: PRIMUS GFS certification (food safety), FDA and SENASICA compliance. Our protocols guarantee safe product from sowing.
quienes.eco_pilar4_desc: A committed team with roots in Zacatecas. Continuous training, superior benefits and a culture of loyalty that transcends generations.
quienes.cap_quote: Our team is the foundation on which every harvest, every shipment, every achievement is built.
quienes.div_sub_fallback: We operate from field to end client with full control of the value chain.
quienes.div_campo_desc_fallback: Production, processing and packing of field products in Loreto, Zacatecas. Own ranches, three pre-cooling plants and PRIMUS GFS standards.
quienes.div_sedis_desc_fallback: Distribution and commercialization center in San Nicolás de los Garza, NL. Full logistics service for retail, foodservice and export.
quienes.primus_desc: Internationally certified food safety across all our production units.

historia.origen_fallback: History of the origins of Grupo Exportador del Campo...
historia.fundadores_fallback: Our legacy is the foundation of our company.
historia.nacidos_texto: Over 50 years ago, in the arid yet fertile lands of Loreto, Zacatecas, our founder Don Ramiro Vizcaíno took the reins of a project that would mark the path of three generations.
historia.hito1_desc: Don Ramiro Vizcaíno starts freight transport operations, laying the foundations of the family business.
historia.hito2_desc: Entry into the livestock business, expanding the productive activities of the Vizcaíno family.
historia.hito3_desc: Opening of the first point of sale at the municipal market, marking the beginning of direct commercialization.
historia.hito4_desc: Start of distribution operations, expanding commercial reach to new markets.
historia.hito5_desc: First export of cabbage, beginning the company's international projection.
historia.hito6_desc: Opening of the point of sale in Guadalajara, consolidating presence in western Mexico markets.
historia.hito7_desc: Construction of the first pre-cooling plant in Zacatecas, raising product quality.
historia.hito8_desc: Inauguration of the second pre-cooling plant, doubling operational capacity.
historia.hito9_desc: Opening of the point of sale in Monterrey, strengthening presence in northern Mexico.
historia.hito10_desc: Purchase of the first agricultural ranch, consolidating direct control over production.
historia.hito11_desc: Acquisition of the second ranch, expanding the company's productive capacity.
historia.hito12_desc: Formal constitution of Grupo Exportador del Campo as an institutional company.
historia.hito13_desc: First official export under the Grupo Exportador del Campo brand.
historia.hito14_desc: Opening of the first Distribution Center in San Nicolás de los Garza, Nuevo León.
historia.hito15_desc: Inauguration of the third pre-cooling plant, consolidating productive infrastructure.
historia.hito16_desc: Strategic alliance closed at a Distribution Center in Tijuana, Baja California.
historia.hito17_desc: We continue to grow with the vision of transcending as a world-class agro-industrial institution.
